name: Zoho Cliq
one_liner: Zoho Cliq is a team chat and collaboration app with a full REST API for messaging, channels, bots, and workflow automation.
access_notes: Zoho Cliq offers a free plan, and OAuth 2.0 client credentials can be self-registered via the Zoho API Console (api-console.zoho.com) with a free Zoho account, giving working API access without payment or human approval.
api_notes: RESTful JSON API (v3 recommended, v2 also available) covering chats, messages, threads, scheduled messages, reminders, pin/star, chat folders, bots, slash commands, message actions, functions, datastores, extensions, and user preferences. Multiple data-center domains (.com/.eu/.in/.au etc.). Broad surface across communication and developer-platform resources.
mcp_notes: Zoho ships an official MCP server for Cliq (zoho.com/cliq/help/platform/zoho-cliq-mcp.html) letting AI agents post messages, manage channels, set reminders, and manage threads; documented as compatible with Claude, Cursor, VS, Windsurf. Rolled out via early access with GA around end of 2025.
main_blocker: None significant; standard OAuth 2.0 app registration in the Zoho API Console is required, which is self-serve and free.

evidence.claim: Zoho Cliq REST API v3 is RESTful, uses OAuth 2.0, and covers chats, messages, bots, functions, datastores, and more.
Zoho Cliq API uses OAuth 2.0; access token passed as a request header.
Zoho ships an official MCP server for Cliq enabling AI agents to access Cliq data and automate tasks.

open_questions: Exact OAuth scope names not enumerated here; whether all v3 endpoints are available on the free plan versus paid tiers not fully confirmed.
